name: Affordable Credit Counseling San Antonio Texas
description_short: Affordable Credit Counseling San Antonio Texas is a credit repair provider based in San Antonio, Texas. Rated 5.0/5 on Google.
description_long:
Affordable Credit Counseling San Antonio Texas is a credit repair provider serving clients in San Antonio, Texas. The company serves consumers in the San Antonio area who are looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Affordable Credit Counseling San Antonio Texas specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores.

When evaluating credit repair services in San Antonio, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Affordable Credit Counseling San Antonio Texas operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the San Antonio, Texas area who are considering Affordable Credit Counseling San Antonio Texas should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.

reviews.author: April Aguilar
reviews.text: The staff is wonderful and very knowledgeable. They are available anytime and respond immediately. They have been helping us for a year now and they have managed to do some serious settling for us while making us feel at ease. I would like to acknowledge Eduardo, he is a wonderful representative there. Not once did he make us feel uncomfortable and showed us an immense of support and respect. They really do care and want to help people.

reviews.author: Rico Silva
reviews.text: Everyone is very nice and friendly at the office, very patient and kind. And that's really rare now a days most places don't care. Im really glad they are there to help you when you really need it. Thank you so very much and keep up the good work that y'all are doing. Have a happy new year in 2024!

reviews.author: Jason Lehman
reviews.text: My wife and our family are very appreciative and blessed to have this Team work for us.  All the effort and contact and communication is guiding us in the right direction and we are looking forward to the future.  Thank you for what you do!
